landing.badge: Your digital advisor for government services
landing.heroSubtitle: Mysorat is at your service — go ahead, how can I help? Describe your request and we'll diagnose your need, request the documents, and follow through until it's done.
landing.stat1Desc: Text, voice, or photo — your way
landing.feature1Desc: Describe your request by voice, text, or photo, and Mysorat diagnoses your need instantly.
landing.feature2Desc: No technical jargon, just direct guidance until the service is done.
landing.feature3Desc: Know exactly where your transaction stands and how much time is left.
landing.feature4Desc: If automation gets stuck, a specialist expert takes over manually.
landing.aiHeading: A unique conversation experience to get things done
landing.aiDesc: No complex forms to fill, no searching scattered websites — just describe your request your way, and Mysorat handles the diagnosis and follow-up.
landing.aiFeature1: Natural understanding of Arabic and its local dialects
landing.aiFeature2: Automatic document image analysis via AI
landing.aiFeature3: Instant diagnosis of the required service, no guessing

trust.title: Trust & Security
trust.subtitle: We handle sensitive government and personal data, and this is what we actually do to protect it.
trust.noteBody: Mysorat is a digital advisor that makes it easier for you to handle government services and follows up on your behalf — it is not an official government entity. We explain your process steps and fees with full transparency, and if automation gets stuck, a specialist expert completes it manually until it's done.

passwordEncryption.title: Password Encryption
passwordEncryption.desc: Your password is never stored as plain text — it's encrypted with the one-way bcrypt algorithm, so no one (not even our team) can recover it.

twoFactorOptional.title: Optional Two-Factor Verification
twoFactorOptional.desc: You can enable an extra layer of protection on your account via an authenticator app (like Google Authenticator) from the Settings page.

dataIsolation.title: Per-User Data Isolation
dataIsolation.desc: No customer can access another customer's transactions or documents under any circumstances — this is enforced at the server level for every request, not just in the interface.

secureDocumentStorage.title: Secure Document Storage
secureDocumentStorage.desc: Uploaded documents are stored in encrypted cloud storage, and are only accessible via temporary links valid for a few minutes upon request.

fullAuditLog.title: Complete Audit Log
fullAuditLog.desc: Every action that touches your transaction (payment, document upload, expert transfer) is logged with timestamp and source, and can be reviewed when needed.

loginProtection.title: Protection Against Repeated Login Attempts
loginProtection.desc: Login and password reset attempts are automatically rate-limited to prevent any automated intrusion attempt.
